name: onestream-rest-proxy
description: OneStream REST API services — static UI + Azure Functions proxy (PAT)

scripts.dev:swa-only: npm run build --prefix api && npx --yes @azure/static-web-apps-cli start ./public --api-location ./api
scripts.dev: npm run build --prefix api && npx --yes concurrently -k -n azurite,swa "npx --yes azurite" "npx --yes wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:10000 && npx --yes @azure/static-web-apps-cli start ./public --api-location ./api"
